Nu-Map Docs
Developer Reference
← Back to Nu-Map
nu-map/documentation / src/ / ports/ / IInstitution.js

IInstitution identity

The minimum your fork must set — institution identity and localStorage namespace. Every other port can stay generic; this one must always be overridden.

Port key
"institution"
Consumed by
DisclaimerModal, PDF header, storage key prefix logic in PlannerContext
Override priority
Required — the generic default is a placeholder, not production-ready

Contract

FieldTypeRequiredPurpose
idstringYesMachine-readable key, e.g. "northeastern". Used to disambiguate storage keys if multiple adapters are ever deployed.
namestringYesFull institution name shown in the About modal and PDF export header.
shortNamestringYesAbbreviation for tight UI spaces, e.g. page titles.
portalNamestringYesName of the student self-service portal, referenced in disclaimers.
degreeAuditNamestringYesName of the official degree audit tool, referenced in disclaimers.
storagePrefixstringYesNamespace for all localStorage keys. Must be unique. NU uses "ncp"; every key is stored as "ncp-...".
logoUrlstring?NoOptional URL to an institution wordmark. Not currently rendered but reserved.

Northeastern reference implementation

// src/adapters/northeastern/institution.js
export default {
  id:              "northeastern",
  name:            "Northeastern University",
  shortName:       "NU",
  portalName:      "MyNEU",
  degreeAuditName: "DegreeWorks",
  storagePrefix:   "ncp",
};

Generic default

// src/adapters/generic/institution.js — placeholder only, always override
export default {
  id:              "map",
  name:            "My University",
  shortName:       "Map",
  portalName:      "Student Portal",
  degreeAuditName: "Degree Audit",
  storagePrefix:   "map",
};
!
The generic default is a development placeholder. If you deploy without overriding IInstitution, users see "My University" everywhere and plans are stored under "map-..." keys, which will conflict if you later change the prefix.

Implementing for your institution

Copy src/adapters/northeastern/institution.js and change all six values:

  1. id — lowercase hyphenated slug, e.g. "boston-university"
  2. name — official full name
  3. shortName — official abbreviation
  4. portalName — your student portal (Banner, MyPortal, ONE, etc.)
  5. degreeAuditName — your degree audit system (DegreeWorks, DARS, uAchieve, etc.)
  6. storagePrefix — short unique string, 3–6 chars. Never change this after deploying — it will orphan all existing saved plans.
